headline: Defense Stocks Are Surging and This ETF Lets You Collect Dividends From the Global Arms Race
summary: Defense stocks have been one of the most compelling stories in the market over the past year, and the iShares U.S. Aerospace & Defense ETF (NYSEARCA:ITA) has reflected that. The fund is up 52.34% over the past year and 7.87% year-to-date through March 18. With geopolitical pressure driving defense budgets higher globally, income investors are ... headline: A Look At Palantir Technologies (PLTR) Valuation After Major U.S. Army Deal And New AI Partnerships
summary: Palantir Technologies (PLTR) is back in focus after clinching a long term US$10b U.S. Army contract and rolling out new defense and AI collaborations with GE Aerospace, Ondas, Nvidia, and key government partners. See our latest analysis for Palantir Technologies. The recent contract wins and AI partnerships come after a sharp run earlier this year, followed by a 17.7% 3 month share price pullback and an 8.99% year to date share price decline. headline: Is GE’s (GE) Expanded Palantir AI Deal Quietly Redefining Its Long-Term Efficiency Narrative?
summary: In March 2026, GE Aerospace and Palantir Technologies expanded their multi-year partnership to roll out agentic AI across GE’s military aviation sustainment and broader production system, aiming to improve supply chain visibility, predict failures, and keep U.S. Air Force fleets mission-ready. By combining GE Aerospace’s engine and manufacturing expertise with Palantir’s AI platform, the collaboration turns complex maintenance and logistics data into automated, real-time workflows that could...
